Condemn incrimination in the name of sedition
-------------------------------

Let's read newspaper in silence to demonstrate our staunch support for freedom of speech and make reading a good habit.

請手足買份蘋果日報然後去建議地點慢慢午餐並嘆飯後(蘋)果。
Please grab a copy of Appledaily and read it at suggested locations during your lunch.

🕐提提你：8月10日蘋果日報老闆及高層被捕，超過200名「執法人員」「搜查」蘋果日報報社
